# Passport negative corpus
Product code: AB123456 (8 chars only, no keyword)
Serial number: A1234567 for device
Part number: B9876543 in inventory
Model AB1234 (6 chars too short)
Order reference A12345678 (no keyword context)
Invoice code B87654321 order
Tracking number C01X00T47 shipment
Color code #AB1234 hex
MAC address AB:12:34:56:78:90
Reference D12345678 for support
Article code E98765432 catalog
SKU F12345678 warehouse
Lot number G87654321 batch
Item number H12345678 stock
Barcode I12345678901234 (too long)
Version J12345678 firmware
Build number K23456789 release
Config ID L12345678 server
Asset tag M87654321 device
Component N12345678 assembly
